title: hemigenia obtusa
intro: Hemigenia obtusa, also known as the Rough Hemigenia, is a perennial herb native to Australia, belonging to the family Lamiaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hemigenia obtusa include soothing wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Hemigenia obtusa is often prepared as a tincture, tea, or infused oil, and can be used topically to treat skin conditions and internally to support overall well-being.
